Introduced Playwright checks for cross-browser scenarios and stabilized flaky tests through better selectors, fixtures, and retry strategy.
Maintained CI quality gates in GitHub Actions and documented release-readiness criteria for engineering squads.
Partnered with backend engineers to validate REST API behavior and improve defect reproduction steps.

summary: Senior Technical Product Manager with 11 years of product experience across SaaS platforms, commerce, and data-driven customer experiences. Skilled in product strategy, roadmapping, analytics, SQL-based prioritization, and stakeholder management, with a track record of aligning engineering, design, commercial, and executive teams. Managed a cross-functional team of 9 people while leading platform initiatives from discovery through launch.

highlights: Owns product strategy and quarterly roadmapping for a B2B commerce platform serving Nordic retail partners.
Uses SQL, funnel analytics, and cohort analysis to prioritize backlog items and validate product decisions with measurable impact.
Managed a cross-functional team of 9 people across engineering, UX, data, and go-to-market functions.
Led stakeholder management with executives, enterprise customers, and delivery teams to align platform investment with revenue goals.
Defined roadmap for analytics products used by operations teams to monitor mobility availability and customer demand.
Partnered with data engineers to translate SQL analysis and dashboard insights into prioritised product improvements.
Introduced discovery rituals, opportunity scoring, and stakeholder review forums that improved roadmap transparency.
Launched self-service reporting features that reduced recurring analyst requests for partner success teams.
Owned roadmap execution for API and identity services used by subscription-based digital products.
Worked with engineering leads to refine technical requirements, manage dependencies, and communicate trade-offs to stakeholders.
Used product analytics and support data to prioritise authentication, onboarding, and reliability improvements.
Coordinated release planning across backend, frontend, QA, and customer operations teams.
Supported discovery, requirements definition, and roadmap updates for payment workflow tools used by small businesses.
Analysed adoption metrics and customer feedback to identify onboarding improvements and reduce drop-off.
Prepared stakeholder updates, sprint goals, and release notes for engineering and commercial teams.

summary: Junior UX/UI Designer with 2 years of product-design experience creating accessible web and mobile flows for fintech and civic-service products. Skilled in Figma, design systems, accessibility, user research, and interactive prototyping, with a BDes in Interaction Design and hands-on experience building reusable component libraries.

highlights: Designed responsive onboarding, account-overview, and transaction-review screens for a digital banking product.
Created accessible design-system components in Figma, including form fields, alerts, navigation patterns, and contrast-compliant states.
Built clickable prototypes for usability sessions and iterated flows based on customer-support insights and stakeholder feedback.
Documented component usage guidance to help engineers implement consistent interaction patterns.
Supported user research for a public-service scheduling platform through interview notes, journey maps, and task-flow analysis.
Translated research findings into wireframes and mid-fidelity prototypes for multilingual Belgian audiences.
Improved form usability by refining labels, error messages, keyboard focus states, and mobile layouts.
Collaborated with product managers and frontend developers to prepare design handoff assets.

projects.name: Accessible Banking Prototype
projects.description: Designed an inclusive mobile banking concept with reusable Figma components, accessible form patterns, clear error states, and a high-fidelity prototype for account setup and payment review flows.
